mapper.select: /* CustScheduleMapper.getMinorSmsTrgtList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS SVC_TEL_NO , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , C.MINOR_AGENT_NAME AS AGENT_NM , CASE WHEN C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN IN ( '010', '011', '016', '017', '018', '019', '070' ) AND C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL AND C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN IS NOT NULL THEN C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN ELSE '' END AS AGENT_TEL_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_REQUEST_AGENT C WHERE A.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND C.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION IS NOT NULL AND C.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION <> '-1' AND FN_GET_AGE('A', A.CONTRACT_NUM) < 19 AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE >= '20150416' AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN IN ( '010', '011', '016', '017', '018', '019', '070' )
